title: THE 2PM CLUB™ LUTON - 80s 90s 00s Daytime Disco
description: Luton, your afternoon is about to change forever. The 2PM Club lands with a four-hour soundtrack of 80s, 90s and 00s hits, the kind of anthems you've been dying to sing at full tilt with your mates. Expect confetti explosions, inflatable mic singalongs, and a buzzing dance floor filled with legends who still know every word. It's the proper night-out energy you crave, but at a time that actually works. Dance hard, sing louder, and feel smug when you're home, happy, and hangover-free by 7.
